heroHeadline: Texas Revolution to Guadalupe Hidalgo: How Mexico Lost Half Its Territory
heroSubtitle: From the 'Come and Take It' cannon at Gonzales to Scott's march into Mexico City — thirteen years that reshaped North America.
footerNote: Data sourced from US National Archives, Texas State Library and Archives, Archivo General de la Nación (Mexico), Library of Congress, and major historical works.
